title: Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited:
Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited!
